'''Intuci''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Abrion sector/Legends|Abrion sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] under the control of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

The war criminal [[Gaar (title)|Gaar]] [[Suppoon]], under the alias of Sonopo Bomoor, sacked the city of [[Bonaka Nueno]] and [[Massacre of Bonaka Nueno|massacred]] its citizens.<ref name="Jabba the Hutt: The Gaar Suppoon Hit">''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Gaar Suppoon Hit]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
